content: Phase 1: POC - yfinance fetch + dividend normalization + Opportunity Score unit tests
Phase 2: Get design guidelines + integration playbooks
Phase 2: Backend core (auth, models, scoring endpoint, asset refresh, watchlist CRUD)
Phase 2: Frontend (landing, auth, dashboard, asset detail, search, settings, i18n 4 locales + currency)
Phase 2: End-to-end testing with testing agent
Phase 3: Alerts end-to-end + notifications inbox (Resend ready)
Phase 5: Stripe billing + feature gating + upgrade page (keys later)
Phase 6: Screener + AI digest + final i18n polish + deploy
